summary: Comprehensive testing of SignalBeast Pro iteration 4 completed. Backend: 31/31 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All major features working. New features tested: TradingView charts (ChartPage), Price alerts CRUD, Notifications system, Strategy builder, Signal performance tracking.

minor.issue: Chart data loads correctly but frontend may show 'No chart data available' briefly during period transitions

ui_bugs.issue: Bell icon click sometimes fails in automated tests due to visibility timing

issues: Missing aria-describedby for DialogContent (accessibility warning in console)

backend: GET /api/market/live - returns crypto (25), forex (12), indian (44) data
GET /api/market/chart/indian/:id - returns Indian market chart data
POST /api/auth/register - creates new user with JWT token
POST /api/auth/login - authenticates user and returns token
GET /api/auth/me - returns user info with valid token
POST /api/chat - sends message and gets AI response
frontend: Landing page loads with hero section and CTA buttons
Auth page with Login/Register tabs and Google OAuth
Dashboard page with live ticker, summary cards, BTC chart, gainers/losers, forex panel, LIVE indicator
Markets page with Crypto/Forex/Indian tabs (25/12/44 assets), search, clickable rows
Chart page navigation from market rows (/chart/:type/:id)
Chart page with TradingView chart, line/candle toggle, period selector (1D/7D/1M/3M/1Y)
Chart page shows live price, volume, market cap stats, watchlist/alert buttons
Alerts page with create alert dialog, market/asset/condition/price fields, current price display
Alerts page shows active/triggered alerts with delete functionality
Signals page with market/asset/timeframe selection, generate signal button
Signals page shows signal cards with confidence ring, BUY/SELL badges
Strategy page with quick templates (Dip Buyer, Breakout Catcher, etc.)
Strategy page with rule builder (IF conditions), save/delete strategies
Portfolio page with add holdings dialog, holdings table, allocation chart, live P&L
Beast AI Chat page with input, suggestion buttons, session continuity
Settings page with profile, notifications, appearance, security sections
Sidebar navigation with 8 items (Dashboard, Signals, Markets, Portfolio, Alerts, Strategy, Beast AI, Settings)

critical_code_review_comments: Consider adding aria-describedby to DialogContent components for better accessibility
seed_data_creation: Created test user, portfolio holdings, price alerts, and strategies during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features working correctly. New features since iteration 3: TradingView charts with lightweight-charts v5, Price alerts CRUD with background checker, Notifications system with bell dropdown, Strategy builder with templates. Market rows are clickable and navigate to /chart/:type/:id. Backend has chart endpoint at GET /api/market/chart/:type/:id with period parameter (1d/7d/1mo/3mo/1y).

features_verified.real_time_data: Live prices with 1-2 second refresh rates via useMarketStream hook
features_verified.dashboard: Ticker tape, summary cards, BTC chart, gainers/losers, forex panel, LIVE indicator
features_verified.markets: All 3 tabs (Crypto/Forex/Indian) with search, clickable rows navigate to chart
features_verified.chart_page: TradingView chart with line/candle toggle, period selector, live price, volume/market cap stats
features_verified.portfolio: Add/delete holdings, live P&L calculation, allocation pie chart
features_verified.alerts: Create/delete alerts, active/triggered status, current price display in dialog
features_verified.notifications: Bell icon with unread count badge, dropdown with mark as read
features_verified.signals: AI signal generation with confidence ring, BUY/SELL filter, live P&L tracking
features_verified.strategy: Quick templates, rule builder with IF conditions, save/delete strategies
features_verified.chat: Beast AI chat with session continuity, suggestion buttons
